text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way back from an errand I was given by
Director Akikawa, Winning Ticket stops me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Trainer over there! You seen a white snake
around?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Another empty lead? White snake, where could
you be?!
choice_data_list: Why are you looking for a white snake anyway?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I need one for a good luck charm! It's a super
high-level spell!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAIT, SERIOUSLY?!
choice_data_list: You didn't tell her the details?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
She ran off before I had the chance to! And we
didn't even have any clues to go on!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I bet Granny'd use her magic and find it straight away.
choice_data_list: She sounds like an incredible woman.
She sounds like an incredible woman.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
She is! That's why I wanna be a great witch like
her one day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
In that case, let's go ask your granny to help us
out!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nooo way! This is something I have to handle
myself!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I'll never be like Granny if I don't!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I will find that white snake, and I will use it for the ritual! And then I'll become a real witch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: AWWW YEEEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're really trying to make your dream come
true! That fighting spirit makes me feel sooo...
FIRED UP! Wooo! Thanks for the boost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna help you out! One way or another, we'll
find that white snake!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heh! Then the search is back on! You help too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I find myself roped into a snake hunt... We
comb the fields together but come up
empty-handed.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's it! I'm tired of walking! I wanna go hooooome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We can't quit now! Let's search the town!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: There's no way it'll be here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We have to try, no matter how slim our chances!
Come on, we're just getting warmed up here,
guys!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give you all I got, Sweep! If you feel
like dropping out, I'm gonna pick you right back
up! That's what I'm here to do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Who said I'm giving up?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Sweep! Hehe, that's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Hold on a sec... Do you see what I see in
that store window?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I FOUND IT! It's a white snaaake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With its geometric patterns and eyes like glass marbles, the snake looks like something an artist would make... Oh wait, it is a work of art.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Not real?! No way... It can't be...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! I'm so sorry, Sweep! I thought we finally had it! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...It's fine, we'll go with this snake. It'll be less
effective, but a doll can work as a substitute—at
least, that's what my grimoire says.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep, this'll do! I'm gonna be a full-fledged witch,
so I'll prove that I can pull this ritual off, real
snake or no!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Sweep! Ohhhh, Sweeeeep! You're gonna make
such an amazing witch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We successfully purchase—er, "capture" the white
snake, bringing a joyful end to our ordeal.
